graph.pageDescription: Who teaches what, and who wants to learn it — the organization's skills network at a glance.
graph.privacy.label: Privacy mode:
graph.privacy.interDesc: Cross-company graph — names are redacted and job title / location are hidden on every node.
graph.privacy.intraDesc: Single-company graph — full names and roles are visible to admins.
graph.error.title: Something went wrong
graph.error.loadFailed: Could not load the knowledge graph.
graph.error.modeChangeFailed: Could not change organization privacy mode.
graph.empty.title: No people match these filters
graph.empty.description: Nobody in the selected scope has the chosen working language yet. Try a different language or company.
graph.hoverHint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom, drag a node to reposition it. Hover to highlight connections. People are coloured by department; diamonds are skills.
